comment: Export to JSON plugin for PHPMyAdmin

data.post_excerpt: I am in Israel, so I will need to do this all by recordings.
Please call me, Id like  to know if this course is a live teleconference
note koralm eibar hobe in shaa allah
can I pay with a cc?

I wrote to Mrs. Levitt several days ago, but did not hear back yet. I live in E"Y, but in a location too far away to attend her regular classes. I want to make sure that I will have access to this course via recording, as I will not be able to attend the "live" sessions. Will that be possible?
